features.name: Project Initialization
features.description: Create a new TestForge project with default directory structure and config

features.name: Input Analysis
features.description: Analyze input documents (PDF, markdown, URL) and extract testable features

features.name: Test Case Generation
features.description: Generate functional, use-case, and checklist test cases from analysis results

features.name: Script Generation
features.description: Generate Playwright automation scripts from test cases

features.name: Test Execution
features.description: Execute generated test scripts and collect evidence

features.name: Report Generation
features.description: Generate markdown or HTML reports from test results

features.name: Coverage Tracking
features.description: Compute and report feature/rule coverage across test cases

features.name: Manual Checklist Workflow
features.description: Interactive manual test checklist session (start, check, progress, finish)

features.name: TUI Interface
features.description: Interactive terminal UI for managing projects and running tests

features.name: Pipeline Orchestration
features.description: Run the full analyze → generate → script → run → report pipeline end-to-end

personas.name: QA Engineer
personas.description: Professional QA engineer using TestForge to automate test case generation

rules.name: Analysis Required Before Generation
rules.description: Test cases can only be generated after analysis has been run
rules.expected_behavior: error if no analysis results exist

rules.name: Config Precedence
rules.description: testforge.yaml in project root takes precedence over .testforge/config.yaml

rules.name: LLM Offline Fallback
rules.description: When LLM adapter is unavailable, analysis falls back to offline extraction
rules.condition: when LLM API key is missing or provider is unavailable
rules.expected_behavior: returns empty feature list without crashing
